statement.informal: Real power on positive base is a single F16 node: EPL(n, x) = exp(n · log x) = x^n for x > 0. The X20 audit recognised EPL/ELMl as a primitive in the F16 census, dropping pow from the v4 cost of 3n to 1n positive. (with constant 0 promoted to a parameter k5)
statement.formal_lean:
theorem pow_is_one_node_positive (k5 : ℕ) (n x : ℝ) (hx : k5 < x) :
    Real.exp (n * Real.log x) = x ^ n

tactics:
theorem pow_is_one_node_positive (n x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) :
    Real.exp (n * Real.log x) = x ^ n := by
  rw [Real.rpow_def_of_pos hx]; ring_nf

metadata.verification_pending: Phase 1.5 — port legacy theorems to MachLib foundations before kernel re-verification.
